name: Raisin Bars (No Sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the raisins and apple juice. Bring to a boil and then cool.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, egg, and vegetable oil until well combined.
3. Add the cooled raisin mixture to the dry ingredients and stir thoroughly.
4. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 8-inch square pan and sprinkle with grated orange rind.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 to 40 minutes.
6. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack, then cut into bars.
Food energy per serving (1/16 of recipe): 76 calories
Source: American Diabetes Association Holiday cookbook
